comparisonBasis.note: Peer figures use each company’s latest annual filing with prominent disclosure that fiscal periods can differ across peers.

companies.periodNote: Peer figures use each company’s latest annual filing with prominent disclosure that fiscal periods can differ across peers.

basis.note: ROE uses average equity over the locked current/prior annual periods.
ROA uses average assets over the locked current/prior annual periods.

rows.label: Earnings Per Share (Diluted)

basis.note: EPS uses diluted weighted-average shares from the income statement.
basis.disclosureText: Earnings Per Share (Diluted) uses diluted weighted-average shares from the income statement.

rows.note: EPS uses diluted weighted-average shares from the income statement.

rows.label: Total Debt
rows.note: Total Debt uses reported total debt when available, otherwise long-term debt plus short-term debt.

basis.note: Equity multiplier uses average assets and average equity for the locked current period.
Asset turnover uses average assets for the current period and prior ending assets for the prior comparison.
BVPS uses period-end shares outstanding.
basis.disclosureText: Book Value Per Share uses period-end shares outstanding.
